properties.name: accept
properties.description: Defines a list of allowed file extensions or MIME types

properties.name: size
properties.description: Sets the display size of the input element

properties.name: single-file
properties.description: Allows only a single file; subsequent uploads replace the current file

properties.name: max-files
properties.description: Limits how many files can be selected; additional files will be rejected

properties.name: max-file-size
properties.description: Maximum allowed file size per file

properties.name: invalid-file-type-error
properties.description: Custom error message shown when a file does not match the accepted types

properties.name: max-files-exceeded-error
properties.description: Custom error message shown when more than the allowed number of files are selected

properties.name: file-too-big-error
properties.description: Custom error message shown when a file exceeds the maximum file size

properties.name: files
properties.description: List of files that have been added to the file picker and passed validation

properties.name: rejectedFiles
properties.description: List of files that have been added to the file picker but failed validation

events.name: `change`
events.description: Emitted when a file is added or removed.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Use the default slot to set the content of the file picker.

slots.name: contextual-help
slots.description: Allows you to add the [Contextual Help](/components/contextual-help/) component to be displayed next to the label.

methods.name: removeAllFiles()
methods.description: Removes all files from the File Picker.
